content.en:
Ye Tian sped up time, quickly passed ten thousand years, and once again condensed a replica body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's duplicate body went to the War Ancestor Realm, and asked the War Ancestor to send him to the Sacred Domain Continent on the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

......

Sanctuary Continent.

Ye Tian descended here again, and some of the Peerless Domain Ancestors who thought that Ye Tian had fallen were shocked when they saw Ye Tian again.

And after the explanations of other non-superior domain ancestors, they knew the reason, and they all envied Ye Tian's doppelganger technique.

Then, Ye Tian returned to the place where he was sitting.

"Wanfa Zhan Ancestor, you really haven't fallen!"

Peng Zu saw Ye Tian and said happily.

"No, it was just one of my clones that fell last time!"

Ye Tian explained.

"Hahaha, if the Silent Annihilation Clan knew, I am afraid that they would be angry to death, they sacrificed a Six-Striped Silent Annihilation Clan, but they haven't killed you yet!"

Pengzu: They laughed.

Peng Zu and they didn't ask Ye Tian about the secret of his clone, after all, even if he asked, Ye Tian couldn't say it, but would offend Ye Tian.

So, they skimmed over the question with great interest.

Then, the days returned to normal.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years had passed, and the Silent Annihilation Clan still didn't know that Ye Tian was not dead, because they didn't attack this line of defense again.

this day.

A team of the Silent Annihilation Clan attacked Ye Tian's defensive line, and the two sides fought.

And Ye Tian once again copied the talent of the Silent Annihilation Clan, after all, this recondensed copy body did not have the Silent Annihilation Ancestral Endowment, so it had to be re-copied.

In this fight, Ye Tian did not kill any of the Silent Annihilation Clan.

Moreover, the news that he is not dead must have been exposed.

......

Annihilation territory.

A Four-Striped Silence Annihilator reported the news of Ye Tian's death to Ao Long.

"Lord Aolong, the last time we sacrificed a Forbidden Soul that the Six Stripes of Silence Clan killed, we saw it again this time!"

The Four-Striped Silence Annihilation reported.

"What, are you sure?"

Olon couldn't believe it.

"Sure, we've fought him, he's still alive, and he's still so strong!"

The Four Stripes of Silence Annihilation affirmed.

"How could it be that he didn't die? Obviously, his body and soul have been annihilated, but he is still alive? Could it be an incarnation? No, if it is an incarnation, we will not be unable to recognize it, it must be a real body! Moreover, the clones of the Superior Domain Ancestors are all weak, and in this time and space, it is difficult for the clones to exert their strength, and even we only need to affect the time and space a little and break the connection between time and space, and their clones will be abolished. Olon muttered.

Because of this, those Peerless Domain Ancestors didn't bother condensing any clones, so they were useless at all.

In the following days, these Silent Annihilation Clans attacked Ye Tian's defense line again and again, testing them again and again, and even isolating time and space to see if Ye Tian was a clone?

As a result, no matter what they did, otherwise there would be no way to affect Ye Tian's combat power.

Obviously, Ye Tian's body is not a doppelganger, but a real body.

They couldn't understand why Ye Tian was still alive, but they didn't dare to come to another life of the Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan to experiment, so they could only ignore Ye Tian and treat Ye Tian as an ordinary Superiorless Domain Ancestor.

And Ye Tian copied a lot of the ancestral endowments of the Silence Annihilation Clan, and exchanged his credit for guarding this place for an ordinary Silence Grass, which is a grass containing the energy of Silence, which is a poisonous weed for others, but a treasure for Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked for leave to go back, preparing to send this Silent Grass back, the most important thing is to send back the ancestral endowment copied from the copied body to the hand, and give it to the body, which is completely his ancestral endowment.

Otherwise, once the copy body dies in battle, the ancestral endowment will be gone.

-------------------

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body is back.

"Extinguish the ancestral endowment, bestow!"

"Time Ancestor Endowment, Bestow!"

Ye Tian's copied body gave all the ancestral endowments copied to his hand, and he could completely fuse these ancestral endowments to make his own ancestral endowments strong again.

Of course, the Ancestral Endowment of Silence and the Ancestral Endowment of Time are the most important, this is the Ancestral Endowment that Ye Tian did not have before.

When all the ancestral endowments were given, Ye Tian's copy body returned to the Sacred Continent again.

For the ancestors, sending people into the Sacred Domain Continent was just a matter of thought, so they were not afraid of trouble, and besides, they only sent them once in a long time, so they didn't bother at all.

Soon after.

Ye Tian fused all the ancestral gifts given by the copy body.

"Silence the grass, I don't know what the effect is?"

Ye Tian swallowed the Silence Grass that contained rich Silence Energy in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!!

The Silence Energy erupted in Ye Tian's body, and then under the effect of the Silence Ancestor Fu, it began to refine Ye Tian's Ancestor Body and Supreme Domain Body.

I don't know how long it has been, but the annihilation energy in Ye Tian's body has been completely refined by him.

"The domain body is a lot stronger, and the ancestral body has also improved a little, but unfortunately it is only the most rubbish Silent Destruction Treasure, if there are enough Silent Destruction Treasures, I am afraid that my strength can be quickly improved, and even my cultivation can be quickly promoted to the middle stage of the Superior Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Unfortunately, the Treasure of Silence is very rare, and although he can exchange it for the Treasure of Silence from the Ancestor, he needs credit.

And guarding the border of the Dark Forbidden Realm can only get a little credit, he can exchange the treasure of Silence, or is it because he killed a few of the Silent Extinction Clan last time, otherwise he needs to guard countless years before he can accumulate the credit of exchanging the Silence Grass.

After all, for the ancestors, the Silent Treasure could improve their cultivation, and they naturally wouldn't just give it to others.

Of course, even if Ye Tian's merits were enough, if he kept exchanging the Silence Treasure, he would be discovered by the Ancestors that he was able to absorb the secret of the Silence Energy.

"The best option is to go in search of the Treasure of Silence! I should talk to the Ancestors and change the patrol mission. With my strength and immortality, patrolling is suitable, and patrolling is easy to encounter the Silent Treasure!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, Ye Tian found Zhan Zu.

"Zhan Zu, if I want to take over the patrol mission and keep guarding that area, it's not for me!"

Ye Tian took the initiative to ask.

"Patrol!" Zhan Ancestor was right to think about it carefully, although patrolling also required the strength of a half-step ancestor at a minimum, although Ye Tian's strength was not as good as a half-step ancestor, the gap was not too far.

Moreover, it doesn't matter if Ye Tian's clone is dead, the patrol can act as a rescue, even if he encounters an attack from the ancestor, Ye Tian can delay the instantaneous time and fight for the chance of survival for other non-superior domain ancestors.

Therefore, Ye Tian is more suitable for patrolling.

"Okay, I agree, I'll talk to the other ancestors later, and I'll let you be one of the patrols!"

Zhan Zu agreed.
